rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/07/2023 (no earlier date available). 1) No courtesy copy of the petition (hard copy) has been received. 2) No proposed order (hard copy) has been received. 3) The box at item 1 of the No DE-120 form must be checked. 4) All the information required by LRSF 14.35(J)(1) must be provided. 5) The petition must be amended and renoticed to allege a specific period for which administration need be continued. See LRSF 14.34(A).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT FISHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Diann Montemayor?S Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement Re: Will Contest
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 07/31/2023 (no earlier date available). The following issues must be addressed: 1) Item 2 of the DE-120 form must state the correct year of the hearing. 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) Re paragraph 1A of the settlement agreement: Will the 40% share allocated to Scott and Deborah be shared with the decedent's other heirs? 4) Re paragraph 1C: DiAnn has not amended her petition to request Dru Parker's appointment as executor. 5) Paragraph 1D: Dru Parker is not a party to the agreement. Has he agreed to perform as stated once appointed? 6) Paragraph 1G: Has Deborah also agreed to dismiss with prejudice her competing petition for her appointment as administrator?

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES T. PORRAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/27/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Published notice showed the wrong hearing date. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate must be published for the hearing on 9/27/23. (2) Notice of Petition to Administer Estate, showing the hearing on 9/27/23, must also be given to (or waived by) all interested parties with the instructions for how to appear remotely attached to the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate. (A Notice of Hearing is NOT appropriate at this initial phase of opening an estate.) Courtesy copies of (1) the proof of publication of the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate, showing the 9/27/23 hearing, and (2) the proof of service of the full, complete Notice of Petition to Administer Estate must be received by the assigned Examiner by 9/18/23 to avoid another continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Off calendar. Request for Dismissal entered on 6/20/2023.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BRUCE EDWARD BENHAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/27/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No copy of the Letters CERTIFIED WITHIN 60 DAYS has been filed yet to confirm that the personal representative of Ursula Elisabeth Benham's estate still has standing. (2) The petition has been AMENDED in the second supplement to seek confirmation that the decedent's 50% community property interest passes to the surviving spouse. This should have been requested in an AMENDMENT to the Spousal Property Petition. [CRC 7.3.] An amendment requires notice. [CRC 7.53(a).] (3) There should be no attachment to a Notice of Hearing other than the instructions for how to appear remotely. Furthermore, Attachment 3 to the proof of service filed on 6/26/23 of the Notice of Hearing mailed on 6/26/23 refers to a Petition to Determine Claim to Property. This is a petition under Probate Code Section 13650, not Section 850. (4) Attaching photocopies of pages of the local rules is NOT a proper way of providing interested parties with instructions about how they may appear remotely. Please see the Courtâs website regarding the instructions that should be attached to a Notice of Hearing. Courtesy copies of the AMENDMENT to the petition and the correct proof of service of notice for the Spousal Property Petition and the amendment thereto must be received by the assigned Examiner by 9/18/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: Please be aware that the date of uploading a pleading is NOT NECESSARILY the date the pleading is e-filed (available for viewing). [See LRSF 14.14. A.] (Issues should be addressed in a supplement or an amendment to a petition (or a completely amended petition, if appropriate) not in response to Examiner's Notes, which are not filed or otherwise part of the record.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOEL HENRY SEIGNEUR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/14/2023. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. The following procedural issues have not yet been cleared since 5/1/2023. Unless all issues properly cleared two weeks prior, petitioner's appearance on 8/14/2023 will likely be required. (1) Explanation why photocopies of an LLC information and of a trust are attached to petition. The court is not inclined to review them unless petition provides a summary and reason for review. (2) Information if there has been (or will be) any Probate proceeding in Arizona. (3) Allegation if this will is validly executed pursuant to Prob. Code [PC] sec. 6113. The will was executed in another state. (4) Confidential statement of driver's license and birth date. LRSF 14.18.E. (5) Caption and body of the petition must clarify why the proposed personal representative is "administrator with will annexed" while the will nominates petitioner to act. PC 8420; 8440. (6) Petition to list all named executors and they must be noticed properly - Paul Vincent Curran. (7) Petition to list all named beneficiaries and they must be noticed properly - Andre Seigneur (8) Petition #5.(3)-(4) and (7)-(8) to be completed re: registered domestic partner and re: issue of a predeceased child. (9) Petition #8 to list all heirs at law, including anyone who is next of kin as #6.f being affirmed. Also, Petition #5.(5) alleges that the decedent was survived by natural or adopted child; however, #8 lists stepchildren only. #5 and #6 information appears contradicting. (10) Notice (DE-121 form) to be given anyone who has not been noticed. PC 8100 (11) Notice of Remote Appearance to be given to all persons who are entitled. :LRSF 14.1.D.(6). (12) Petition may address higher compensation (5%) provided by will. PC 10802.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For 1)Misuse Of Power Of Attorney Under Probate Code Section 4231.5, 4540 And 4541 2)Revocation Of Authority Of Respondent As Attorney In Fact Under Probate Code Section 4541(D) 3) Accounting And Surcharge By Respondent As Attorney In Fact For A Principal Under Probate Code Section 4541(C) 4) Elder Financial Abuse 5) Negligence/Negligence Per Se
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/27/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No courtesy copies have been received by the examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] (3) No proper Notice of Hearing appears to have been given to all interested parties. And notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Deadline is 9/15/23 for delivering the proposed order and endorsed filed courtesy copies of the petition and proof of service of the Notice of Hearing to the assigned examiner. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DURABLE POWER OF ATTORNEY OF TOM HOUSTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION Petition: (I) To Determine Whether Power Of Attorney Is In Effect, And (Ii) To Compell Third Person
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/27/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No courtesy copies have been received by the examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] (Only a copy of Tara Houston's Response filed on 5/25/23 has been received as of 6/30/23.) (3) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] Deadline is 9/15/23 for delivering the proposed order and endorsed filed courtesy copies of the petition and proof of service of the Notice of Hearing to the assigned examiner. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIANA GANTUS WALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will. No appearance required. Status of closing the estate is set for August 26, 2024

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RENE D. CHEVALIER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 08/12/2024.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VINCENT D LEW
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of filing Inventory and Appraisal is set for 12/11/2023. If Inventory and Appraisal [Form DE-140] is not on file two weeks prior, appearance will be required at the hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for August 26, 2024. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of status report is filed two weeks prior the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SCOTT EDWARD WILLIAMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 08/12/2024.
